title: Pap Smear: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
your provider to learn what your Pap smear results mean. If they are concerned about your results, they may perform a colposcopy . This is an exam that uses a special magnifying instrument to look closely at your cervix to help diagnose or rule out cervical cancer.
Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
